EUROMILLIONS.METHOD_MONTE_CARLO_MAXFREQ_TITLE: Calibracin Monte Carlo de la frecuencia mxima
EUROMILLIONS.METHOD_MONTE_CARLO_MAXFREQ_DESC: Compara la frecuencia mxima observada en bolas con simulaciones uniformes sin reemplazo; p-valor emprico.

EUROMILLIONS.METHOD_CHI2_GOF_UNIFORM_AI_SPEC: BINDING METHOD (user choice: ? nave uniform). Scope = JSON `sinceInclusive` / `tail` / `periods` only. (1) Main balls 1?50: let n = number of draws in scope, total slots = 5n. For each k?{1,?,50}, count O_k = appearances of k across all five positions of all draws (order within a draw irrelevant). Expected E = 5n/50 each. Pearson ?_main = ?_k (O_k?E)/E with df = 49. Use PatTool pre-counts in `periods[].mf` / `chi2MainNaive` as cross-check but recompute from `tail` if you show detail. (2) Stars by FDJ era: assign each draw to period P1/P2/P3 using `periodCuts` and JSON `periods[]` starMax (9 / 11 / 12). Within period j with n_j draws and starMax S_j, pool 2n_j star-slots; counts O_s for s?{1,?,S_j}; expected E_j = 2n_j/S_j each; ?_stars,j = ?_s (O_s?E_j)/E_j with df = S_j?1. State hypotheses explicitly (uniform marginal over slots within era). Do not replace this by generic multinomial-without-replacement theory unless clearly labeled extra; primary deliverable = these ? statistics + df + plain interpretation.
EUROMILLIONS.METHOD_ENTROPY_NORMALIZED_AI_SPEC: BINDING METHOD (user choice: normalized Shannon entropy). Scope = draws in `tail` aligned with `periods`. Natural log. (1) Mains: empirical p_k = (count of ball k in pooled 5n slots)/(5n), k=1..50. H_main = ?? p_k ln p_k (0 ln 0 = 0). H_norm_main = H_main / ln(50) ? [0,1]; equals 1 iff uniform on categories.
